name: Sweet Pickled Cherry Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pickling mixture by combining sugar and water in a large pot.
2. Add grated ginger root to the mixture and stir until dissolved.
3. Once the sugar has completely dissolved, add lemon zest and pickling salt.
4. Use only the juice and grated zest of the 2 lemons for this recipe.
5. Boil the mixture on medium heat until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Allow the mixture to cool before packing into sterilized jars.
7. Seal the jars tightly and store in a cool, dark place until ready to use.
